name: Appliancer Conversion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>塊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コンバート
desc: Banish as many "Appliancer" Link Monsters from your Main Monster Zone as possible, then you can Special Summon your banished "Appliancer" Link Monsters up to the number banished by this effect. During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish 1 other "Appliancer" Spell/Trap from your GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Appliancer Conversion" once per turn.
eff: Banish as many "Appliancer" Link Monsters from your Main Monster Zone as possible, then you can Special Summon your banished "Appliancer" Link Monsters up to the number banished by this effect. During your Main Phase, if this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish 1 other "Appliancer" Spell/Trap from your GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Appliancer Conversion" once per turn.

action: Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
